top_categories.workout_context: 62 miles on mixed terrain burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Granfondo Bratislava's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before August.
58ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Granfondo Bratislava's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 62 miles.
At Granfondo Bratislava, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Granfondo Bratislava. Train it until it feels boring.
Varied gradients on mixed terrain demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
Base fitness for Granfondo Bratislava. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Granfondo Bratislava, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Low-cadence force work for 3,600ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mixed terrain. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.

race_overlay.heat: August in Bratislava, Slovakia can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Granfondo Bratislava. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Granfondo Bratislava’s 62 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Granfondo Bratislava. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Granfondo Bratislava requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Race Simulation, and TT Threshold to prepare you for 62 miles of mixed terrain in Bratislava, Slovakia.
